title: Pets Purest Duck Dog Treats, Air-Dried Strip Duck Fillets for Dogs - 100% Natural Dog Chews, Grain Free, High Protein, Raw Treats Suitable for Puppy & Senior - 100g
features: Duck Strips Natural Dog Treats: Made from 100% duck, our air-dried strip duck fillets for dogs are dog chews you can feel good about. A healthy any-time reward or as dog training treats, these duck treats for dogs are 100% natural, nutrient dense and highly palatable for even the pickiest of eaters. The perfect alternative to processed dog biscuits, give our dog and puppy treats from 8 weeks for a natural gamey flavour they will love.

Air-Dried Raw Dog Treats: Packed with natural goodness, our air-dried duck strips for dogs are gently prepared using a slow, low-temperature drying process, locking in flavor and preserving vital nutrients your dog needs to thrive. Ideal for raw-feeding diets, and made with a single-source novel protein, our dog duck treats have a chewy, satisfying texture with the rich taste of real meat.

Delicious & Nutritious Duck Treats: Made from 100% pure duck, our nutrient rich dog treats deliver high quality novel protein that provides an excellent energy source. Providing a complete Amino Acid profile for muscle maintenance and repair, and healthy fatty acids Omega 3 and Omega 6 to support skin, coat, and brain health. Highly digestible and very palatable, duck is packed with vital vitamins and minerals, including B Vitamins, Zinc, and Selenium supporting immune function and overall wellness - a fantastic treat for active dogs!

Grain Free Dog Treats: Not only are our dog treats single-source protein but they are also grain-free making them ideal for dogs with specific dietary needs or sensitivities. Some dogs react poorly to grains, developing symptoms such as itchy skin, ear infections, or digestive upset. Grain-free treats eliminate those triggers and dogs with sensitive stomachs digest grain-free formulas better. We skip low-nutrient fillers and focus on high quality meat as our primary (and only) ingredient.

No Nasties Natural Dog Chews: Pets Purest range of hypoallergenic dog treats and made of the very best natural ingredients, to help keep pets feeling healthy from the inside out! Unlike traditional dog food and treats, which are packed full of unnecessary ingredients with no beneficial effects for your pup, Pets Purest treats only contain ingredients that truly benefit your pet's health. And we are proud to say they are really tasty too!

specifications_table.Storage Information: ‎Store in a cool dry place away from direct sunlight. For animal use only. Keep out of reach from children.
